data.label: PerfGenius
data.description: PerfGenius SDK 提供系统状态变化主动上报、显示帧率设置、关键线程设置等接口，为开发者提供一条与硬件直接沟通的通道。开发者借此能了解系统状态并适时调整部分参数，提升系统的性能功耗体验。

data.label: PerfGenius
data.description: The PerfGenius SDK offers interfaces for active system status reporting, frame rate configuration, and key thread settings, providing a direct communication channel with hardware. This allows developers to monitor system status and adjust parameters in real-time to optimize performance and power efficiency.
